task.goal: Drive the car around the generated track and visit as many track tiles as possible.
task.success_condition: A strong episode completes most or all of the lap and reaches a high positive score.
task.reward_description: The environment gives -0.1 reward per frame and positive reward for newly visited track tiles. Going far off track can terminate the episode with a large penalty. Higher total return is better.
notes: This is an image task: the policy receives the official top-down 96x96 RGB observation as an image artifact path.
Continuous actions control steering, gas, and brake.
The generated track is random for each episode seed.

minimum_score.reason: Policy errors, invalid actions, evaluator failures, and workspace contract violations receive a conservative low score.

observation_meanings.name: rgb_frame
observation_meanings.meaning: Top-down 96x96 RGB image of the car, track, and dashboard indicators.

action_meanings.name: steering
action_meanings.meaning: Steering command in [-1, 1], where -1 is full left and +1 is full right.
